chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1146 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 19.09.2025 Syed Zafar Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General along with Waseem Mahar, Assistant Commissioner New Sukkur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After filing verification by the Assistant Commissioner New Sukkur, learned counsel for petitioner, under instructions does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
